effects.effect: While the dragon is flying, they shape themself into a blade and fall. Each creature and object in the dragon's space when they hit the ground and in a 6 x 4 line within 1 square of the dragon takes 7 damage. A creature who takes this damage and has A < 4 takes 4 extra damage per square the dragon fell and is restrained (save ends). A creature not restrained this way can move into the nearest unoccupied space.
The dragon shakes loose a cloud of shattered weapons in a 6 x 4 line within 1 square of them. Each creature and object in the area makes an **Agility test**.
The dragon takes an additional main action on their turn. They can use this feature even if they are dazed.
The dragon superheats the ground across the encounter map until the end of the round. Any enemy who starts their turn on the ground is slagged as if affected by the dragon's Slag Spew ability.

The dragon thickens the fog of their Gloaming Wyrmscale Aura trait and the horrors within it. Each creature in the area takes a bane on strikes made against the dragon until the start of the dragon's next turn.
The dragon manifests four 2 cubes of nightmarish apparitions anywhere on the encounter map. Each creature in the area when it appears makes an **Intuition test**.
The dragon takes an additional main action on their turn. They can use this feature even if they are dazed.

The dragon summons macabre, disquieting phantasms in a 10 cube within 1 square that lasts until the end of the encounter. Any enemy who enters the area for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes 6 psychic damage, or 8 psychic damage if they are dragonsealed by the gloom dragon. Additionally, the enemy's Intuition score is treated as 1 lower for the purpose of resisting potencies until the end of the encounter.
The next time the dragon uses their Crescent Claws ability, they can also slide the target up to 5 squares. If the target is dragonsealed, the dragon can vertical slide them instead.
The dragon takes an additional main action on their turn. They can use this feature even if they are dazed.
The dragon drops stars into five 2 cubes anywhere on the encounter map. The area is difficult terrain, and each creature and object in the area when it appears makes an **Agility test**.

A black hole manifests as a 1 cube within 20 squares of the dragon in an unoccupied space. Each creature who has M < 5 and each object of size 3 or smaller is vertical pulled 2 squares toward the area at the start of each round, ignoring stability. Any creature who starts their turn in the area or any object in the area at the end of the round suffers the effect of the dragon's Voidlight Breath ability, and the black hole disappears.
The dragon expands their wings to create a shroud of shadow. Until the start of the dragon's next turn, any strike made against them takes a bane.
The dragon flies up to 10 squares and carries fated souls with them. Each creature in the area of the dragon's Stagnant Wyrmscale Aura trait makes a **Presence test**.
The dragon takes an additional main action on their turn. They can use this feature even if they are dazed.

Each edge of the encounter map burns with intangible purple flames until the end of the encounter. The flames expand by 1 square at the end of every turn. Any enemy takes 5 corruption damage for each square of flames they enter.
A cage of thorns grows around one dragonsealed enemy on the encounter map, making that enemy restrained until the end of their next turn.

The dragon grows a 10 wall of briars in unoccupied spaces on the encounter map. The wall blocks line of effect for all creatures except the dragon. Each square of the wall has 5 Stamina and fire weakness 5. The area can be moved through but is difficult terrain. Any creature who is force moved into or within the area takes 1 damage for each square of the area entered and is bleeding until the end of their next turn.
The dragon takes an additional main action on their turn. They can use this feature even if they are dazed.
The dragon summons poisonous, biting thorns around their foes. Each enemy on the encounter map makes an **Agility test**.

effects.name: End Effect
effects.effect: At the end of each of their turns, the dragon can take 10 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

effects.name: Solo Turns
effects.effect: The dragon can take two turns each round. They can't take turns consecutively.

The dragon's scales create a 3 aura of magnetism around them that affects large masses of metal. Any creature who enters the area for the first time in a round or starts their turn there while wearing metal or while slagged (see Slag Spew) is pulled up to 2 squares toward the dragon. A creature pulled this way who has M < 3 is unable to willingly move away from the dragon.

features.name: Slag Spew
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.tier1: 13 fire damage; the target is slagged (save ends)
effects.tier2: 10 fire damage; the target is slagged (save ends)
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes an Agility test.
A slagged target is coated in molten metal and takes 2d6 fire damage at the start of each of their turns. If a slagged target has M < 3 they are restrained (save ends) whenever they take cold damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The dragon can make a free strike against each slagged target knocked prone this way.
The strike deals 1d6 cold damage.

Once per round while the dragon is flying using their Thermodynamic Flight ability, they give off a blast of steam to extend the duration of their flight until the end of the next round. Each creature in a 4 cube within 1 underneath the dragon when they use this ability takes 7 fire damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The dragon expels blistering steam, dealing 7 fire damage to each target in the area. The dragon then shifts up to their speed vertically and can fly until the end of the round.

features.name: Hammer and Anvil
features.trigger: While flying, the dragon starts their turn or moves.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The dragon drops to the ground and uses Forge Hammer Tail Slam, which deals an extra 4 damage for each square they descended.

features.name: Polarize Aura
features.target: Each creature and object in the area
features.trigger: The dragon is targeted by two melee strikes in the current turn.

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: The target must be size 2 or smaller.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Shields embedded under the dragon's scales emerge, and the dragon gains damage immunity 6 at the start of each round until the end of the encounter. If the dragon takes any damage, they lose this immunity until the end of the current round.

features.name: Polarity Chaos
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes a **Might test**.

While the dragon is flying, they shape themself into a blade and fall. Each creature and object in the dragon's space when they hit the ground and in a 6 x 4 line within 1 square of the dragon takes 7 damage. A creature who takes this damage and has A < 4 takes 4 extra damage per square the dragon fell and is restrained (save ends). A creature not restrained this way can move into the nearest unoccupied space.
The dragon shakes loose a cloud of shattered weapons in a 6 x 4 line within 1 square of them. Each creature and object in the area makes an **Agility test**.
The dragon takes an additional main action on their turn. They can use this feature even if they are dazed.
The dragon superheats the ground across the encounter map until the end of the round. Any enemy who starts their turn on the ground is slagged as if affected by the dragon's Slag Spew ability.

effects.name: End Effect
effects.effect: At the end of each of their turns, the dragon can take 10 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

effects.name: Solo Turns
effects.effect: The dragon can take two turns each round. They can't take turns consecutively.

The dragon's scales create a 3 aura of dark supernatural fog around them that feeds on their victims' fears and provides concealment to the dragon only. Each enemy who starts their turn in the area takes 2 psychic damage. Additionally, whenever one or more enemies is in the area, the dragon's abilities deal an extra 3 psychic damage.

features.name: Breath of Brume
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.tier1: 14 cold damage; the target is dragonsealed (save ends)
effects.tier2: 11 cold damage; the target is dragonsealed (save ends)
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes an **Agility test**.
A dragonsealed creature has psychic weakness 3 and cold weakness 3. Additionally, the area is filled with magical darkness. The dragon ignores concealment created by this darkness.
The pull becomes a vertical slide.

Once per turn, the dragon can shift up to their speed, leaving behind a 4 cube area of magical darkness in their starting space that lasts until the end of the encounter. The dragon ignores concealment created by this darkness. Any enemy who ends their turn in the area and has I < 3 is frightened of the dragon until the end of their next turn.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target must be dragonsealed. Each target takes 3 psychic damage, and if they have I < 3 they immediately make a free strike against one ally of the dragon's choice.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The dragon moves two existing cubes of magical darkness they created up to 10 squares each.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target must be dragonsealed. Any target who has I < 3 is also dazed (save ends).

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The dragon disappears from the encounter map. The dragon and three hallucinatory illusions of themself then immediately reappear in unoccupied spaces on the encounter map, and the dragon and each illusion uses Breath of Brume. Each illusion is indistinguishable from the dragon except by supernatural means, has 1 Stamina, and has the dragon's speed. An illusion acts on the dragon's turns but can take only move actions. Once per round before or after using an ability, the dragon can trade places with any duplicate.

The dragon thickens the fog of their Gloaming Wyrmscale Aura trait and the horrors within it. Each creature in the area takes a bane on strikes made against the dragon until the start of the dragon's next turn.
The dragon manifests four 2 cubes of nightmarish apparitions anywhere on the encounter map. Each creature in the area when it appears makes an **Intuition test**.
The dragon takes an additional main action on their turn. They can use this feature even if they are dazed.

The dragon summons macabre, disquieting phantasms in a 10 cube within 1 square that lasts until the end of the encounter. Any enemy who enters the area for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes 6 psychic damage, or 8 psychic damage if they are dragonsealed by the gloom dragon. Additionally, the enemy's Intuition score is treated as 1 lower for the purpose of resisting potencies until the end of the encounter.

effects.name: End Effect
effects.effect: At the end of each of their turns, the dragon can take 20 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

effects.name: Solo Turns
effects.effect: The dragon can take two turns each round. They can't take turns consecutively.

The dragon's scales create a 1 aura of void space around them. Any enemy who starts their turn in the area takes 10 cold damage and is suffocating. Each time the dragon takes damage, the area of the aura increases by 1 (to a maximum of 5), and they deal an extra 5 damage the next time they use an ability that deals rolled damage.

features.name: Gravity Well
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.tier1: 20 sonic damage; the target is dragonsealed (save ends)
effects.tier2: 16 sonic damage; the target is dragonsealed (save ends)
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes a **Might test**.
A dragonsealed target emits a golden aura, and takes 2 damage per square moved when falling or when force moved into an obstacle.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: If a target made weakened this way is already weakened, they are instead dazed until the end of their next turn.

Once per turn, the dragon chooses a target within 3 squares. The dragon can make a free strike against the target, and ignores banes when using abilities against the target until the start of their next turn.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target must be dragonsealed. The dragon chooses a direction and vertical slides each target 10 squares in that direction, ignoring stability. A target who strikes an obstacle takes damage as if they had fallen the forced movement distance.

features.name: Field Collapse
features.trigger: The dragon takes damage from an ability while the area of their Voidshroud Wyrmscale Aura is 2 or more.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The dragon halves the damage. Each enemy and object in the area of the dragon's Voidshroud Wyrmscale Aura trait takes 5 sonic damage and is pulled up to 5 squares toward the dragon. The area of the wyrmscale aura then resets to 1.

features.name: A Hero Faces the Void
features.trigger: A creature within distance spends their Heroic Resource to use an ability.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: While frightened this way, the target can't use the triggering ability.

features.name: Impactful Arrival
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target takes 30 fire damage, and if they have M < 5, they are knocked prone.

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: The dragon can use this ability before the encounter begins.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Until the end of the encounter, each enemy who is dragonsealed and weakened and who the dragon has line of effect to loses 1 of their Heroic Resource at the start of each of their turns (to a minimum of 0). The dragon then uses their Cosmic Tail Ray ability with a double edge, targeting four creatures or objects.

features.name: Voidlight Breath
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.tier1: 25 damage; I < 6 the target is annihilated
effects.tier2: 21 damage; I < 5 the target is annihilated
effects.tier3: 15 damage; I < 4 the target is annihilated
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes an Agility test.
An annihilated target must make the test again, decreasing the potency for themself by 2 each time they are annihilated. A creature reduced to 0 Stamina by this dies and their soul is destroyed.
The next time the dragon uses their Crescent Claws ability, they can also slide the target up to 5 squares. If the target is dragonsealed, the dragon can vertical slide them instead.
The dragon takes an additional main action on their turn. They can use this feature even if they are dazed.
The dragon drops stars into five 2 cubes anywhere on the encounter map. The area is difficult terrain, and each creature and object in the area when it appears makes an **Agility test**.

A black hole manifests as a 1 cube within 20 squares of the dragon in an unoccupied space. Each creature who has M < 5 and each object of size 3 or smaller is vertical pulled 2 squares toward the area at the start of each round, ignoring stability. Any creature who starts their turn in the area or any object in the area at the end of the round suffers the effect of the dragon's Voidlight Breath ability, and the black hole disappears.

effects.name: End Effect
effects.effect: At the end of each of their turns, the dragon can take 15 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

effects.name: Solo Turns
effects.effect: The dragon can take two turns each round. They can't take turns consecutively.

Several of the dragon's abilities impose a Deathcount on a target. At the end of every turn, a creature with a Deathcount who is within the area of the dragon's Stagnant Wyrmscale Aura has that Deathcount reduced by 1. When a creature's Deathcount hits 0, they die. If multiple Deathcounts are imposed on a creature, they don't stack. Only the lowest Deathcount takes effect. All Deathcounts are lost when the dragon is reduced to 0 Stamina.

The dragon's scales create a 4 aura of supernatural stagnancy around them. The area is difficult terrain for enemies, and no creature except the omen dragon can regain Stamina while in the area. Any creature dragonsealed by the omen dragon who starts their turn in the dragon's aura and doesn't have a Deathcount gains a Deathcount of 12.

features.name: Corroding Breath
features.target: Each creature and object in the area

effects.tier1: 18 corruption damage; the target is dragonsealed (save ends)
effects.tier2: 14 corruption damage; the target is dragonsealed (save ends)
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes an **Agility test**.

Only creatures with souls can be dragonsealed by the omen dragon. A dragonsealed creature appears ghastly and pale, their Presence score is treated as 1 lower for the purpose of resisting potencies, and they can't treat other creatures as allies.
The potency increases by 2, and each target is also pulled up to 5 squares.
Once per turn, the dragon chooses one creature with a Deathcount within line of effect. That creature can choose to take 1d6 damage and lose a recovery to increase their Deathcount by 5.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target must be dragonsealed. Each target takes 9 corruption damage, and the omen dragon regains Stamina equal to half the total damage dealt. The target then loses their dragonseal.

features.name: Don't Turn Away
features.trigger: A creature leaves the area of the dragon's Stagnant Wyrmscale Aura trait.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The dragon shifts up to their speed, and the Deathcount of each dragonsealed creature who comes adjacent to the dragon during this shift is reduced by 1.

features.name: Repent!
features.trigger: A dragonsealed creature within distance deals damage to the dragon.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target must choose between making a free strike against themself or gaining a Deathcount of 5.

effects.tier1: Pull 1; the target has a Deathcount of 10
effects.tier2: Pull 2; the target has a Deathcount of 8
effects.tier3: Pull 3; the target has a Deathcount of 6

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target receives a premonition of their imminent death.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The dragon spits fragments of souls to attempt to possess the targets, making a separate power roll for each target.

effects.tier2: P < 5 the target moves up to their speed toward the dragon
effects.tier3: P < 5 the target makes a free strike against the nearest ally

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target must be dragonsealed. The dragon's eyes glow with unequalled malevolence, and any target who has a Deathcount has that Deathcount reduced to 1.
The dragon expands their wings to create a shroud of shadow. Until the start of the dragon's next turn, any strike made against them takes a bane.
The dragon flies up to 10 squares and carries fated souls with them. Each creature in the area of the dragon's Stagnant Wyrmscale Aura trait makes a **Presence test**.
The dragon takes an additional main action on their turn. They can use this feature even if they are dazed.

Each edge of the encounter map burns with intangible purple flames until the end of the encounter. The flames expand by 1 square at the end of every turn. Any enemy takes 5 corruption damage for each square of flames they enter.

effects.name: End Effect
effects.effect: At the end of each of their turns, the dragon can take 10 damage to end one effect on them that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

effects.name: Solo Turns
effects.effect: The dragon can take two turns each round. They can't take turns consecutively.

The dragon's scales create a 2 aura of withering green magic around them. Any creature other than the dragon who regains Stamina in the area regains only half the expected amount. Any winded creature who enters the area for the first time in a round or starts their turn there takes 1d3 corruption damage.

features.name: Virulent Breath
features.target: Each enemy and object in the area

effects.tier1: 12 poison damage; the target is dragonsealed (save ends)
effects.tier2: 9 poison damage; the target is dragonsealed (save ends)
effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target makes a **Might test**.
A dragonsealed creature has their wounds bound by nettles and thorns, causing them to take an extra 1d3 damage whenever they take damage rolled as a d6 or a d3.
Each target takes an extra 1d3 damage, and if they have A < 2, they are bleeding (save ends).

Once per turn, the dragon shifts up to 5 squares and can move through enemies' spaces at their usual speed. The first time the dragon moves through an enemy's space during this movement, the enemy takes 3 damage.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Each target must be dragonsealed. Each target is pulled up to 5 squares toward the dragon, who gains 5 temporary Stamina for each target pulled.

features.name: Prickly Situation
features.trigger: A dragonsealed creature within distance ends the dragonsealed effect.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The target is pulled up to 5 squares toward the dragon, and if they have A < 2, they are restrained until the end of their next turn.

features.name: Thorny Scales
features.trigger: A creature within distance deals damage to the dragon with a melee strike.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The dragon makes a free strike against the target, and if the target has M < 2, they are bleeding until the end of their next turn.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: The thorns upon the dragon's scales grow longer and sharper. Until the end of the encounter, any adjacent creature who targets the dragon with a melee strike takes 3 damage. The dragon then uses their Provoking Nettles ability.

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Poisonous overgrowth and seeking vines cover all surfaces on the encounter map. The dragon uses their Bramble Barricade Malice feature twice at no cost. Until the end of the encounter, any creature force moved by the dragon takes 1d3 poison damage, and if they have M < 2, they are weakened (save ends).

effects.name: Special
effects.effect: If the Thorn Dragon's Domain trait is in effect, any creature other than the dragon who starts their turn on the encounter map takes 1d3 poison damage.
A cage of thorns grows around one dragonsealed enemy on the encounter map, making that enemy restrained until the end of their next turn.

The dragon grows a 10 wall of briars in unoccupied spaces on the encounter map. The wall blocks line of effect for all creatures except the dragon. Each square of the wall has 5 Stamina and fire weakness 5. The area can be moved through but is difficult terrain. Any creature who is force moved into or within the area takes 1 damage for each square of the area entered and is bleeding until the end of their next turn.
The dragon takes an additional main action on their turn. They can use this feature even if they are dazed.
The dragon summons poisonous, biting thorns around their foes. Each enemy on the encounter map makes an **Agility test**.
